name: Feta-Herb Ladolemono
servings: prep time: 5 minutes | cook time:5 minutes |serves 4
method: Whisk together the lemon juice, feta, oregano, and garlic, if using, in a medium bowl. While whisking, drizzle in the olive oil in a slow, steady stream and whisk until smooth and creamy.
Season to taste with salt and pepper.
